name: Marblehead Joe Frogger Cookies
recipeInstructions: Cream together shortening and sugar until light. In another bowl, combine baking soda and dark molasses and add rum; blend together. In a separate bowl, sift flour with ginger, allspice, nutmeg, cloves, and salt. Alternately fold the dry mixture and the flavored shortening mixture into the creamed mixture, stirring well after each addition. Chill overnight in the refrigerator. Roll out on a floured surface to about ½‑inch thickness, then cut into desired shapes using a large cookie cutter or the rim of a wide glass (3 inches is ideal). Bake at 375°F for 10–12 minutes. The cookies will crack slightly on top as they cool, which is traditional and adds character. Serve and enjoy!
